case_title: HARIRI, ROXY vs. TISHGAR & STOCKFORD, A PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TISHGAR & STOCKFORD, A PARTNERSHIP TISHGART, KENNETH B.
